title_variants: Sheffield Loft: Hot Tub & City Views
The Loft: 4 Bed, City Centre, Hot Tub
City Centre Loft with Hot Tub & Parking
analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience the ultimate city retreat in our stunning 4-bedroom loft apartment, perfectly located in the heart of Sheffield City Centre. Enjoy breathtaking views of the city from our rooftop terrace, complete with a 6-person hot tub. With 2 dedicated car parking spaces, you'll have no trouble getting here. Our spacious open-plan living area features a fully equipped kitchen, 10-seater dining table, and a large U-shape leather sofa. Each of the 4 bedrooms is stylishly decorated, with 3 king-size beds and 1 single bunk bed. You'll also have access to 2 bathrooms, one with a large walk-in shower. Our apartment is exclusively yours for the duration of your stay, so relax, unwind, and make yourself at home. We're just a short walk from all the bars, theatres, restaurants, and universities, making us the perfect base for your Sheffield adventure.
analysis.photo_order_rec: The rooftop terrace with hot tub should be the cover photo, as it's the most unique and attention-grabbing feature of the apartment. This will help to immediately differentiate the listing from others in the area.
key_diagnosis: With a nightly rate of £422.2, you're 302% above the cohort median of £104.90, which may be limiting your occupancy potential
Your 53.3% occupancy rate is only slightly above the cohort median of 48.9%, indicating room for improvement in attracting more guests
With 56 photos, you have more than twice the median photo count of 23, but may benefit from reordering them to showcase your most unique features first
analysis.outreach_hook: With a nightly rate 302% above the cohort median and an occupancy rate only slightly above average, there may be opportunities to optimize your pricing and listing to attract more guests
